initiatives.title: Preventive analyzer + test for stdout-write invariants
initiatives.notes: Plan-draft grep returned 4 hits, all Console.Out.Flush() in Program.cs (protocol-correct). Scope shifted from find-and-fix to preventive RMCP010 analyzer + test.

initiatives.title: PreToolUse guard for release-managed files
initiatives.notes: Hook config + workflow doc; no programmatic test surface — manual verification on next session.

initiatives.title: Alias canonical Roslyn tools to common python-refactor names
initiatives.notes: Catalog-touching: orchestrator MUST place into a different wave than initiative 4 per executor §2a (one catalog-toucher per wave). Aliases for get_symbol_outline, find_duplicated_code, get_test_coverage_map (the 3 named in retro evidence). Production file count widened from planned 3 to actual 7 (5 Tools/*.cs + 2 Catalog partials + README.md surface-count bump) — find_duplicated_methods lives in AdvancedAnalysisTools.cs and test_coverage in TestCoverageTools.cs (not AnalysisTools.cs as plan assumed); plus a new shared ToolAliasDeprecation.cs helper to avoid duplicating the deprecation factory across the 3 Tools/ files. Forced fragmentation, not scope creep; shims-added: 0.

initiatives.title: New find_type_consumers MCP tool
initiatives.notes: Rule 3 new-MCP-tool structural-unit exemption: 4 structural units (Core DTO/interface, Roslyn service method on TypeConsumersService, Host.Stdio SymbolTools, catalog+DI registration) plus README surface-count addendum. Registered as experimental tier (new tool, soak before promotion). README anchor was 165→166 (live count) not 162 as plan field stated; verified via ReadmeSurfaceCountTests.

initiatives.title: Lengthen reconciler check-poll loop
initiatives.notes: Subagent prompt edit only; no programmatic test surface. Rule update: 1×60s retry → 12×60s retries with progress. Failing checks still short-circuit early-exit.

initiatives.title: PostToolUse hook for shipped-skill linter
initiatives.notes: Hook config + thin stdin-JSON dispatcher (eng/verify-skills-on-edit.ps1) to sidestep brittle nested shell-quoting. Manual violation test confirmed hook surfaces violation with exit 1 in same turn.

initiatives.title: Replace heartbeat polls with single-shot status checks
initiatives.notes: Closed as obsolete — audit of all 17 SKILL.md files mentioning server_heartbeat found 0 poll-loop offenders. Every mention is the canonical single-precheck pattern (post-PR #393 connection-state-ready guidance) or a single transport probe. The 78-call evidence cited in the original retro must have come from agent-level wait behavior, not from the shipped skill prompts. Backlog row closed with rationale.

initiatives.title: Markdown response option for validate_workspace
initiatives.notes: Narrowed to validate_workspace ONLY per Rule 3 file budget. responseFormat defaults to null → bit-for-bit identical JSON envelope; markdown shape caps per-diagnostic / per-test rows at 20 each. Follow-up rows for server_info / workspace_list / etc. not yet opened.

initiatives.title: New semantic_grep MCP tool
initiatives.notes: Rule 3 new-MCP-tool structural-unit exemption: 4 structural units (Core DTO/interface, new SemanticGrepService, Host.Stdio AnalysisTools, catalog+DI) plus README surface-count addendum. Registered as experimental tier (new tool, soak before promotion). Surface bumped 166→167 (111 stable / 56 experimental). Release verifier 1001/1001 tests passed. P4-weak-evidence: revisit if external-repo sessions don't reproduce the value within 30 days.

initiatives.title: Hook validates preview tokens (heroic — needs split)
initiatives.notes: Deferred at plan-draft — *_apply tool methods spread across 25+ files in src/RoslynMcp.Host.Stdio/Tools/. Adding required previewToken parameter to every *_apply violates Rule 3 file budget by ~6×. Recommended: open a dedicated phased plan via /backlog-intake heroic-split or hand-author a new plan dir with 6-7 phases (one per tool family). Backlog row stays open.

initiatives.title: Populate MCP annotation hints (heroic — needs split)
initiatives.notes: Deferred at plan-draft — 0 occurrences of readOnlyHint/destructiveHint/idempotentHint/openWorldHint across src/. Populating across all 162 tools would touch most of the 25+ Tools/*.cs files (Rule 3 violation). Recommended: phased plan with RMCP011 analyzer + per-batch initiatives (~20 tools each). Backlog row stays open.

initiatives.title: Cleanup-race flakes (dedicated phased plan)
initiatives.notes: Deferred — owned by ai_docs/plans/20260422T170500Z_test-parallelization-audit/plan.md. Backlog row stays open; that plan owns localization + fix phases.

initiatives.title: Daemon investigation (heroic-last, profile-evidence gated)
initiatives.notes: Deferred — gated on docs/large-solution-profiling-baseline.md evidence. Reactivate when 50+ project workspace_load timings land. Backlog row stays open.
